mapper.sql: SELECT fp.id, fp.author_id AS authorId, fp.title, fp.summary, fp.content, fp.nickname, fp.avatar, ua.nickname AS authorNickname, ua.avatar AS authorAvatar, fp.view_count AS viewCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.page = CONCAT('forum-post-', fp.id) AND c.status = TRUE ) AS commentCount, fp.is_pinned AS isPinned, fp.is_featured AS isFeatured, fp.create_time AS createTime, fp.update_time AS updateTime, GREATEST( COALESCE(fp.last_activity_time, fp.update_time, fp.create_time), COALESCE( ( SELECT MAX(c.create_time) FROM comment c WHERE c.page = CONCAT('forum-post-', fp.id) AND c.status = TRUE ), fp.create_time ) ) AS lastActivityTime FROM forum_post fp LEFT JOIN user_account ua ON fp.author_id = ua.id

where.if: AND ( fp.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR fp.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR fp.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
ORDER BY fp.is_pinned DESC, fp.is_featured DESC, commentCount DESC, fp.view_count DESC, lastActivityTime DESC
ORDER BY fp.is_featured DESC, fp.is_pinned DESC, lastActivityTime DESC, fp.create_time DESC
ORDER BY fp.is_pinned DESC, lastActivityTime DESC, fp.create_time DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
